data.biography: Megumi Ogata is a Japanese voice actress and singer from the Greater Tokyo Area. As a singer, she goes by the name em:óu. She attended Tokai University, but left due to lack of interest. She is also best known for voicing Makoto Naegi and Nagito Komaeda from the Danganronpa Series, Sailor Uranus from Sailor Moon, Kurama from Yu Yu Hakusho, Tier Harribel from Bleach, and Shinji Ikari from Neon Genesis Evangelion, as well as playing Yugi Mutou and Dark Yugi in Yu-Gi-Oh! and also Yukito Tsukishiro/Yue in Cardcaptor Sakura.
data.name: Megumi Ogata

data.biography: 绪方惠美是日本东京都出生的女配音兼歌手，B型双子座。桐朋女子中学、高中毕业；东海大学海洋学系肄业。东京声专音乐学校（现在为昭和音乐艺术学院）歌剧科及同研究科毕业。代表作有《幽游白书》（藏马／南野秀一）、《美少女战士Sailor Moon S》（天王遥／水手天王星）、《新世纪福音战士》（碇真嗣）等。绪方惠美是声优界的反串男角最为著名的女性声优。出道作《幽游白书》中，她饰演冷静的美少年藏马（南野秀一），略带沙哑却充满磁性的低沉声线不仅令这一角色人气急升，更确立了她为男性角色献声的路线。

data.biography:
Boyd was born in Bedford, Texas. He currently lives in Los Angeles, California with his parents and actress sister, Jenna Boyd. Cayden plays the violin and cello, is on a football team, and is also a proud Christian. Cayden is more experienced in the acting world than most children his age. Growing up in Texas with his parents and sister Jenna Boyd he has been able to stay grounded and says, "My parents are a big help, and they're always making sure I have a normal life and my life isn't all just about acting and stuff."

Cayden landed his first roles, small television roles and commercials, as young as 6 and 7. He was cast alongside Sean Penn and Tim Robbins in film "Mystic River". In 2004, Cayden won the lead role in children's film "The Adventures of Sharkboy and Lavagirl". Cayden has also appeared in a number of TV dramas, including "Crossing Jordan", "Cold Case" and "Close to Home". He also had a small but crucial role in the film "X-Men: The Last Stand". In 2008, Cayden starred alongside Julia Roberts and Willem Dafoe in "Fireflies in the Garden", with a strong performance as young Michael.

In 2010 Cayden took the leading role in the pilot episode of a new TV show "Past Life" giving a very strong performance, and is in possible talks to be returning to the show at a later date.

Boyd has had bit parts in several feature films, including Freaky Friday and Dodgeball: A True Underdog Story. He also played Tim Robbins's son in Mystic River and appeared on the sitcom Scrubs. Boyd's biggest role to date may have been as Max in The Adventures of Shark Boy and Lava Girl. Most recently, he played young Warren Worthington III in X-Men: The Last Stand, and he also had a starring role in the 2007 film Have Dreams, Will Travel.

アメリカ生まれの東京都育ち。5歳までサンフランシスコで暮らしていた。

10代の頃から児童劇団に所属していた。

当初は舞台俳優を目指していたが、『ER緊急救命室』の吹き替えに参加したことがきっかけになり、本格的に声優として活動するようになった。活動初期においては吹き替えで活躍し、2001年からNHK教育で放送された海外ドラマ『ワンだー・エディ』では初主演（エディ役）を果たす。

吹き替え分野で活動していた頃は「アニメの現場とは縁がないと思っていた」とのことだが、吹き替えのディレクターが参加していた作品である『一騎当千』のオーディションに呼ばれ、同作品にてアニメ初レギュラーを獲得した。

吹き替え・アニメ・ゲーム・ナレーションなど、様々な分野での声優活動を行っている。

2011年6月までぷろだくしょんバオバブに所属していた。同年7月よりアクセルワン所属。

2015年1月に当人のブログにて、中島沙樹と2014年に結婚したことを発表した。

data.biography:
Josh Wiggins (* 2. November 1998 in Houston) ist ein US-amerikanischer Filmschauspieler, der als Kinderdarsteller durch die Filme Retribution und Max bekannt wurde.

Als Wiggins in der vierten Klasse war, vertrieben er uns seine Freunde sich die Zeit, indem sie zum Spaß Filme im Stil von Martin Scorsese und Spoof-Videos der Fernsehserie Law & Order drehten und diese auf YouTube veröffentlichten. Zufällig hatte die Drehbuchautorin und Regisseurin Kat Chandlers diese Videos gesehen, und hierin fiel ihr insbesondere die Ausstrahlung von Wiggins auf. Da sie ihn für eine Rolle in einem ihrer Filme geeignet hielt, lud sie ihn zu einem Vorsprechen nach Los Angeles ein. Hiernach hatte Wiggins seine erste Hauptrolle in dem Film Retribution, der ursprünglich als Hellion betitelt war, erhalten, in dem er in der Rolle von Jake Wilson an der Seite von Aaron Paul und Juliette Lewis spielte und der beim Sundance Film Festival 2014 für den Grand Jury Prize nominiert wurde. Auch Wiggins erhielt für seine Rolle als Unruhestifter, der sich in diesem Film in Heavy-Metal-Musik flüchtet, äußerst positive Kritiken und wurde hierbei immer wieder mit dem jungen Leonardo DiCaprio verglichen.

Für seine Rolle im Film Max, der im Juni 2015 in die US-amerikanischen Kinos kam, erhielt Wiggins eine Nominierung für einen Young Artist Award in der Kategorie Beste Leistung in einem Spielfilm – junger Hauptdarsteller (14 bis 21 Jahre). In Mean Dreams, der im Rahmen der Internationalen Filmfestspiele von Cannes 2016 seine Premiere feierte und im März 2017 in die US-amerikanischen Kinos kam, spielt Wiggins den Jungen Jonas Ford, der versucht, seinem Elternhaus zu entkommen. Im Film Walking Out erhielt Wiggins die Rolle von David, der seinen Vater nach einem Jagdunfall aus der Wildnis Montanas retten muss.

Quelle: Wikipedia

data.biography:
Nuno Gallego Fernández (born September 6, 2001, Ourense, Spain) is a Spanish actor who has quickly emerged as one of the most promising talents of his generation. Trained in acting at the Escuela Municipal de Arte Dramático in Madrid and at the prestigious Real Escuela Superior de Arte Dramático, he is known for his versatility and the intensity he brings to each role.

He rose to international recognition playing Héctor Krawietz in Netflix’s hit series Élite, where his performance added a new dynamic to the show’s universe. He later appeared in acclaimed productions such as UPA Next and Clanes, further establishing himself as a rising star.

In 2025, Gallego took on the role of Cristian Delallave in Olympo, a Netflix original series considered the spiritual successor to Élite. His character, a young and ambitious rugby player, combines charisma with deep personal insecurities, showcasing Gallego’s ability to portray complex emotions.

With a career on the rise and a magnetic on-screen presence, Nuno Gallego is regarded as one of Spain’s brightest emerging actors, winning over both critics and audiences with his authenticity and dedication to the craft.
data.name: Nuno Gallego

data.biography:
Nuno Gallego Fernández (n. 16 de junho de 2001, Ourense, Espanha) é um ator espanhol que rapidamente se tornou uma das revelações da nova geração de intérpretes ibéricos. Com formação em interpretação pela Escola Municipal de Arte Dramático de Madrid e pela Real Escuela Superior de Arte Dramático, destacou-se pela sua versatilidade e pela intensidade que imprime às suas personagens.

Ganhou notoriedade internacional com o papel de Héctor Krawietz na série de culto Élite (Netflix), onde a sua interpretação trouxe nova energia ao universo da produção. Seguiram-se participações em títulos de relevo como UPA Next e Clanes, consolidando o seu talento junto do grande público.

Em 2025, Gallego voltou a destacar-se ao assumir o papel de Cristian Delallave em Olympo, série original da Netflix apresentada como a sucessora espiritual de Élite, onde dá vida a um jovem jogador de râguebi ambicioso, carismático e marcado por inseguranças pessoais.

Com uma carreira em ascensão e presença magnética no ecrã, Nuno Gallego é hoje considerado uma das promessas mais sólidas do audiovisual espanhol, conquistando tanto a crítica como o público com a sua autenticidade e dedicação à arte de representar.

Amakawa Haruto, một sinh viên bị tai nạn chết đi trong khi vẫn nặng lòng về mối tình đầu thuở ấu thơ với Ayase Miharu. Hắn được chuyển sinh sang một thế giới khác sống với thân phận Rio nhưng vẫn lưu giữ ký ức của tiền kiếp.

Một thế giới huyền ảo khắc nghiệt, Rio mồ côi mang theo mối thù giết mẹ, một ngày nọ có một cô công chúa bị bắt cóc, hắn vô tình giải cứu được cô nàng và từ đó cuộc đời Rio đã rẽ sang một bước ngoặt hoàn toàn mới.

data.biography:
Ashe was born in Tehran, Iran. She immigrated to the United States when she was nine months old. Ashe grew up in Powell, Ohio, right next to the state capital, Columbus. She participates in theatrical productions of her high school as an actress and director.

She received a BA in Fine Arts from Boston University School of Drama, and also trained at the Academy of Music and Drama in London and the Upright Citizens Brigade Theater in New York.

She then plays in many regional and Off-Broadway productions. Her first screen role was as Nadia in the 2008 film Waiting in Beijing. She guest-starred on various series such as Law & Order, Law & Order: Criminal Intent, 30 Rock and Covert Affairs. She also has recurring roles on Smash and American Odyssey. She is also part of the cast of As the World Turns. In 2017, she joined the main cast of DC's Legends of Tomorrow as Zari Tomaz.
data.name: Tala Ashe

data.biography: Tala Ashrafi (24 de julio de 1984), conocida profesionalmente como Tala Ashe, es una actriz iraní-estadounidense. Mayormente conocida por su aparición en series de televisión como Smash, American Odyssey, As the World Turns y por su aparición estelar en la serie de superhéroes de The CW, Legends of Tomorrow, donde interpreta a Zari Tomaz.

Η Talayeh Ashrafi, γνωστή επαγγελματικά ως Tala Ashe, είναι Ιρανοαμερικανίδα ηθοποιός. Είναι γνωστή για τους ρόλους της στην τηλεοπτική σειρά Smash, American Odyssey και As the World Turns, καθώς και τον κανονικό της ρόλο ως Zari Tarazi στην υπερηρωική σειρά The CW Legends of Tomorrow

Ashe est née à Téhéran, en Iran. Elle immigre aux États-Unis à l'âge de neuf mois. Ashe grandit à Powell, dans l'Ohio, juste à côté de la capitale de l'État, Columbus. Elle participe aux productions théâtrales de son lycée en tant qu'actrice et metteur en scène.

Elle obtient une licence en beaux-arts à l'École de théâtre de l'Université de Boston, et suit également une formation à l'Académie de musique et d'art dramatique de Londres et au Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre de New York.

Elle joue ensuite dans de nombreuses productions régionales et Off-Broadway. Son premier rôle à l'écran est celui de Nadia dans le film Waiting in Beijing en 2008. Elle est invitée à jouer dans diverses séries comme Law & Order, Law & Order : Criminal Intent, 30 Rock et Covert Affairs. Elle joue également des rôles récurrents dans Smash et American Odyssey. Elle fait aussi partie de la distribution de As the World Turns. En 2017, elle rejoint la distribution principale de DC's Legends of Tomorrow dans le rôle de Zari Tomaz.

Yuki Kaida is a voice actress (seiyuu) and radio personality from Tokyo, Japan. Although she has an extensive vocal range, voicing a large variety of characters throughout her career, she is commonly typecasted as young males, achieving mainstream success as her roles in Hunter × Hunter as Kurapika, The Prince of Tennis as Shusuke Fuji, and Shounen Onmyouji as Abe no Masahiro. She was formerly affiliated with the talent management agency Toritori Office, but is currently freelance.

She holds the distinction of being one of the only Japanese voice actors to have completed their formal education in the United States. Consequently, she speaks multiple languages with varying degrees of fluency outside of Japanese. She is affectionately nicknamed Yukki (ゆっきー) by her Japanese fans.

data.biography:
Jack O'Connell (born 1 August 1990) is an English actor. He first gained recognition for playing James Cook in the British television series Skins (2009–2010, 2013). He is also known for his roles in This Is England (2006), the slasher film Eden Lake (2008), the television dramas Dive (2010) and  United (2011), and the Netflix Wild West miniseries Godless (2017), for which he received a Critics' Choice Television Award nomination.

O'Connell gave critically acclaimed performances in the independent films Starred Up (2013) and '71 (2014), garnering nominations for the British Independent Film Awards. He subsequently starred as war hero Louis Zamperini in the war film Unbroken (2014) and received the BAFTA Rising Star Award. He has since starred in the thriller Money Monster (2016), the biographical drama Trial by Fire (2018), the BBC miniseries The North Water (2021), the BBC series SAS: Rogue Heroes (2022–2025), the Amy Winehouse biographical film Back to Black (2024) and the period horror film Sinners (2025).

Description above from the Wikipedia article Jack O'Connell, licensed under CC-BY-SA, is a full list of contributors on Wikipedia.

Jack O'Connell (ur. 1 sierpnia 1990) to angielski aktor, który po raz pierwszy zyskał sławę jako James Cook w Skins (2009–2010, 2013). Znany jest także z Pukeya Nichollsa w This Is England (2006), ról w slasherze Eden Lake (2009) i serialach telewizyjnych Dive (2010), United (2011) oraz roli Roya Goode'a w dzikim serialu Netflix zachodni miniserial Godless (2017). O'Connell dał docenione przez krytyków role w niezależnych filmach Starred Up (2013) i '71 (2014). Następnie zagrał bohatera wojennego Louisa Zamperiniego w filmie wojennym Unbroken (2014), za który otrzymał nagrodę BAFTA Rising Star Award. Od tego czasu zagrał w thrillerze Money Monster (2016), dramacie biograficznym Trial by Fire (2018) i miniserialu BBC The North Water (2021).

Jack O'Connell (geboren op 1 augustus 1990) is een Engelse acteur die voor het eerst bekendheid verwierf als James Cook in Skins (2009-2010, 2013). Hij is ook bekend van Pukey Nicholls in This Is England (2006), rollen in de slasher-film Eden Lake (2009) en de televisiedrama's Dive (2010), United (2011) en het spelen van de hoofdrol, Roy Goode, in de Netflix-wildernis. westelijke miniserie Godless (2017).

O'Connell gaf veelgeprezen optredens in de onafhankelijke films Starred Up (2013) en '71 (2014). Vervolgens speelde hij de rol van oorlogsheld Louis Zamperini in de oorlogsfilm Unbroken (2014), waarvoor hij de BAFTA Rising Star Award ontving. Sindsdien speelde hij in de thriller Money Monster (2016), het biografische drama Trial by Fire (2018) en de BBC-miniserie The North Water (2021).

杰克·奥康奈尔（Jack O'Connell，1990年8月1日-）是一位英国演员，他在《皮肤》（2009-2010年，2013年）中饰演詹姆斯·库克（James Cook）一举成名。他还因《这就是英格兰》（2006 年）中的普基·尼科尔斯、恐怖电影《伊甸湖》（2009 年）和电视剧《潜水》（2010 年）、《联合》（2011 年）中的角色而闻名，并在 Netflix 狂野西部迷你剧《无神》（2017 年）中扮演主角罗伊·古德。

奥康奈尔在独立电影《星光熠熠》（2013 年）和《71 年》（2014 年）中的表演广受好评。随后，他在战争电影《坚不可摧》（2014 年）中饰演战争英雄路易斯·赞佩里尼，并因此获得了英国电影学院奖新星奖。此后，他出演了惊悚片《金钱怪物》

data.biography: Jack O’Connell (* 1. August 1990 in Alvaston, Derby, England) ist ein britischer Schauspieler, der vor allem durch seine Rolle als James Cook in der Fernsehserie Skins – Hautnah bekannt wurde. Sein Spielfilmdebüt gab er 2006 in This Is England. Große internationale Aufmerksamkeit erlangte er 2014 durch die Hauptrolle des Louis Zamperini im Kriegsdrama Unbroken unter der Regie von Angelina Jolie. Für diese Rolle nahm er eine starke körperliche Veränderung vor und erhielt dafür viel Lob. Weitere bedeutende Filme sind Starred Up (2013), ’71 (2014) und Money Monster (2016). Im Fernsehen war er unter anderem in der Netflix-Miniserie Godless (2017) zu sehen. 2024 spielt er Blake Fielder-Civil in der Amy Winehouse-Biografie Back to Black. 2025 ist er im Horrorfilm Sinners zu sehen, in dem er einen irischen Vampir spielt, was seine irischen Wurzeln widerspiegelt. Zudem wurde er für eine Rolle im Monsterverse-Film Godzilla x Kong: Supernova (2027) verpflichtet. O’Connell hat den BAFTA Rising Star Award gewonnen und gilt als vielseitiger Schauspieler mit einer Vorliebe für anspruchsvolle Charaktere.

Jack O'Connell, 1 Ağustos 1990 tarihinde Derby, Derbyshire, İngiltere'de dünyaya gelmiştir. İşçi sınıfı bir ailede büyüyen O'Connell, gençliğinde profesyonel futbolcu veya asker olmayı hedeflese de, Nottingham'daki Television Workshop adlı drama okulunda aldığı eğitimle oyunculuğa yöneldi. Profesyonel kariyerine, Shane Meadows'un yönettiği kült film "This is England" (2006) ile adım attı.

Ancak onu Birleşik Krallık'ta geniş kitlelere tanıtan rol, E4 kanalında yayınlanan ve bir döneme damgasını vuran gençlik dizisi "Skins"in (2009–2010, 2013) üçüncü ve dördüncü sezonlarında canlandırdığı asi ve karizmatik James Cook karakteri oldu. Bu rol, onun ham ve enerjik oyunculuk tarzını sergilemesini sağladı. 2010'lu yılların başında O'Connell, sinemadaki yerini sağlamlaştıran bir dizi güçlü performans sergiledi. Özellikle, bir hapishane draması olan "Starred Up" (2013) ve Kuzey İrlanda sorunlarını konu alan gerilim filmi "'71" (2014) filmlerindeki başrolleri, eleştirmenlerden büyük övgü aldı ve onun ne kadar yetenekli bir dram oyuncusu olduğunu kanıtladı.

Uluslararası alandaki asıl çıkışını, Angelina Jolie'nin yönettiği ve İkinci Dünya Savaşı kahramanı Louis Zamperini'nin hayatını konu alan "Unbroken" (Boyun Eğmez) (2014) filmindeki başrolüyle yaptı. Bu zorlu rol için gösterdiği fiziksel ve duygusal adanmışlık, onun Hollywood'da da tanınan bir isim olmasını sağladı. Bu rol ve diğer başarılı performansları sayesinde 2015 yılında BAFTA Yükselen Yıldız Ödülü'nü (BAFTA Rising Star Award) kazandı.

Kariyeri boyunca Jodie Foster'ın yönettiği "Money Monster" (Para Tuzağı) (2016) filminde George Clooney ve Julia Roberts gibi isimlerle çalıştı. Son dönemdeki önemli rolleri arasında, Michael Mann'in yönettiği "Ferrari" (2023) filminde yarış pilotu Peter Collins'i ve Amy Winehouse'un hayatını anlatan "Back to Black" (2024) filminde sanatçının eski eşi Blake Fielder-Civil'i canlandırdığı performanslar yer almaktadır.

Genellikle fiziksel olarak zorlayıcı, isyankâr ve karmaşık karakterleri canlandırmadaki başarısıyla tanınan O'Connell, neslinin en yetenekli ve saygın İngiliz aktörlerinden biri olarak kabul edilmektedir.

Au cinéma, il est révélé par Les Poings contre les murs (2013) et '71 avant d'obtenir le rôle de Louis Zamperini dans le film Invincible en 2014.

Robert Boyd Holbrook (born September 1, 1981) is an American actor.

His TV roles include playing DEA agent Steve Murphy on the Netflix series Narcos (2015–2016), the Corinthian on The Sandman (2022–), "Cap" Hatfield on History Channel's miniseries Hatfields & McCoys, and Clement Mansell on Justified: City Primeval (2023).

His movie roles include playing Billy in The Skeleton Twins (2014), Peter Kristo in A Walk Among the Tombstones (2014), Donald Pierce in Logan (2017), Quinn McKenna in The Predator (2018), Pinkins in O.G. (2019), Thomas Lockhart in In the Shadow of the Moon (2019), Ty Shaw in Vengeance (2022), and Klaber in Indiana Jones and the Dial of Destiny (2023).

From Wikipedia , the free encyclopedia.

Бойд Холбрук

Американский актёр кино и телевидения, а также модель и художник. Наибольшую известность приобрёл ролью в драматическом телесериале «Нарко», где исполнил роль агента УБН Стива Мёрфи.

Холбрук выпустил мини-серию стихотворений на веб-сайте Model-Max.com в сопровождении иллюстраций от Джейми Страчана.

Участвуя в фэшн-показах в Европе и Азии, Холбрук накопил достаточно денег для изучения киноискусства Нью-Йоркском университете, где он получил сертификат «SCPS 16mm Film». Затем Бойд посещал занятия в Колумбийском университете на кафедре истории кино и сценарного дела. С тех пор он спродюсировал пять короткометражных фильмов.

Бойд изучал актёрское мастерство в студии Уильяма Эспера, где прошёл двухгодичный курс обучения, также он участвовал в специализированной программе подготовки от Шейн Энн Янтс (англ. Shane Ann Younts — где обучался постановки голоса и речи. В 2007 году, когда он послал свой сценарий режиссёру Гасу Ван Сенту, который был настолько впечатлён талантом начинающего кинематографиста, что предложил ему небольшую роль в своём фильме «Харви Милк». В тот же период он снялся в музыкальном видео на песню «Allison» панк-группы Permanent Me, вместе с еще одной моделью — Тиа Экхардтом.

Среди других увлечений Холбрука: фотографирование и создание скульптур. Его дебютное арт шоу — «Iscariot», проходило с 19 апреля по 17 мая 2008 года в нью-йоркской галерее RARE.

В 2015-м году исполнил роль агента УБН Стива Мёрфи в телесериале «Нарко»

В 2017 году снялся в "Логоне" где его партнером по площадке стал Хью Джекман

А в 2018 года выступил в главной роли в ленте "Хищник" Шейна Блэка.

data.biography: Robert Boyd Holbrook (Prestonsburg, 1 de setembro de 1981) é um modelo e ator americano. Seus trabalhos mais notáveis foram, na série da Netflix como agente da DEA Steve Murphy em Narcos, William "Cap" Hatfield na minissérie Hatfields & McCoys, Kyle O'Shea em The Host e seu último papel foi Donald Pierce no filme Logan, lançado em 2017.

Robert Boyd Holbrook (* 1. September 1981 in Prestonsburg, Kentucky) ist ein US-amerikanischer Schauspieler und Model.

2008 erhielt er eine erste Nebenrolle in Gus Van Sants Biopic Milk. Es folgten Auftritte in Fernsehproduktionen wie The Unusuals und The Beautiful Life. 2013 hatte Holbrook kleinere Auftritte in den Filmen Seelen und Liberace, 2014 in David Finchers Thriller Gone Girl – Das perfekte Opfer.

Von 2015 bis 2016 war Holbrook in einer Hauptrolle in der Netflix-Serie Narcos über Drogenkartelle in den 1980er und 1990er Jahren in Kolumbien zu sehen.

Quelle: Wikipedia

Urodził się w Prestonsburgu w stanie Kentucky jako syn Ellen i Dona Holbrooków. Został odkryty podczas pracy jako stolarz w Jenny Wiley Theatre w Kentucky. W 2001 podpisał kontrakt z Elite Models Management. Pracował dla innych agencji, takich jak Wilhelmina Models. Gucci, Jean-Paul Gaultier, Versace, Hugo Boss AG, Calvin Klein, Moschino, Marc Jacobs i DSquared[6]. Jego kariera modela pozwoliła mu sfinansować studia na wydziale filmowym na Uniwersytecie Nowojorskim[7]. Uczył się aktorstwa w nowojorskim William Esper Studio z Amy Schumer. Od 19 do 17 maja 2008 w nowojorskiej galerii sztuki The Rare Gallery jako zapalony fotograf miał swoją wystawę Iscariot. Od marca 2014 do stycznia 2015 był zaręczony z aktorką Elizabeth Olsen. Spotykał się z Maiką Monroe. W 2018 ożenił się z Tatianą Pajkovic, z którą ma syna.

data.name: ボイド・ホルブルック

data.biography:
Robert Boyd Holbrook, 1 Eylül 1981 tarihinde Prestonsburg, Kentucky'de dünyaya gelmiştir. Kariyerine şans eseri başlayan Holbrook, Kentucky'deki bir tiyatroda marangoz olarak çalışırken bir model ajansı tarafından keşfedildi. Kısa süre sonra New York'a taşınarak Elite Models ile anlaştı ve Gucci, Jean Paul Gaultier, Hugo Boss ve Dior Homme gibi dünyanın önde gelen markaları için modellik yaparak uluslararası alanda başarılı bir kariyer edindi.

Modellik kariyeri devam ederken oyunculuğa olan ilgisini keşfeden Holbrook, New York Üniversitesi'nde senaryo yazarlığı ve film yapımı üzerine dersler aldı ve William Esper Stüdyosu'nda oyunculuk eğitimi gördü. Sinemadaki ilk rolünü Gus Van Sant'ın yönettiği ve eleştirmenlerce beğenilen "Milk" (2008) filmiyle aldı. Kariyerinin ilk yıllarında "The Big C" gibi dizilerde ve "İntikam Benim" (Out of the Furnace) (2013) gibi filmlerde yardımcı rollerde yer aldı. David Fincher'ın yönettiği gerilim filmi "Kayıp Kız" (Gone Girl) (2014) filmindeki rolüyle daha geniş kitlelerin dikkatini çekti.

Boyd Holbrook'u uluslararası alanda tanınan bir yüze dönüştüren rol, Netflix'in dünya çapında fenomen olan dizisi "Narcos"ta (2015-2016) canlandırdığı DEA ajanı Steve Murphy oldu. Dizinin ilk iki sezonunda başrolü üstlenen Holbrook, bu performansıyla büyük beğeni topladı. Bu başarının ardından Hollywood'un aranan isimlerinden biri haline geldi ve 2017'de büyük beğeni toplayan "Logan" filminde canlandırdığı karizmatik ve acımasız kötü karakter Donald Pierce ile sinemadaki yerini sağlamlaştırdı.

Kariyeri boyunca çok yönlülüğünü kanıtlayan Holbrook, "The Predator" (2018) filminde başrol oynadı ve "In the Shadow of the Moon" (2019) adlı bilimkurgu geriliminde başrolü üstlendi. Son yıllardaki en dikkat çekici performanslarından birini, Neil Gaiman'ın aynı adlı çizgi romanından uyarlanan "The Sandman" (2022) dizisindeki kabus karakteri The Corinthian rolüyle sergiledi. Ayrıca "Indiana Jones ve Kader Kadranı" (Indiana Jones and the Dial of Destiny) (2023) ve "The Bikeriders" (2023) gibi yüksek profilli filmlerde de önemli roller aldı. Oyunculuğun yanı sıra, Holbrook aynı zamanda bir senarist, kısa film yönetmeni ve heykeltıraştır.

data.biography:
Don Knotts (July 21, 1924 – February 24, 2006) was an American comedic actor best known for his portrayal of Barney Fife on The Andy Griffith Show and Ralph Furley on Three's Company.

Knotts was married three times. His marriage to Kathryn Metz lasted from 1947 until their divorce in 1964, and he raised his daughter as a single parent.  He married Loralee Czuchna in 1974 and they divorced in 1983. His third marriage was to Frances Yarborough, from 2002 until his death in 2006. From his first marriage, Knotts had a son, Thomas Knotts, and a daughter, actress Karen Knotts (born April 2, 1954).

Knotts died at age 81 on February 24, 2006, at the Cedars-Sinai Medical Center in Los Angeles from pulmonary and respiratory complications of pneumonia related to lung cancer.  CLR
data.name: Don Knotts

data.biography: Ross O'Hennessy was born in Pontllanfraith, South Wales but always knew he wanted to be actor. So at the tender age of 16 he packed his bags and moved to London. He spent a few years treading the boards with the National Youth Theatre before winning the Sir John Mills Scholorship to attend Private Drama School. After finishing a 3 years diploma course at The Mountview Academy of Theatre Arts, Ross launched straight into a highly successful play with Lauren Bacall which in turn took him to the Royal Shakespeare Company. From Theatre to Film and television was a natural progression and he has worked successfully on screen and his career continues to grow from strength to strength.

data.biography:
Chantal Herman was a South African actress best known for her role as Lorn in the SABC3 sitcom Shado's. She was also known for her roles as Sylvia Hiscock on both seasons of the SABC3 sitcom Those Who Can't and as Liz Isaacs on the SABC2 comedy-drama The Riviera. Born and raised in Cape Town, Chantal attended the Waterfront Theatre School.

She made numerous other television appearances. She played On!TV reporter Irene Bunton on the SABC3 soapie Isidingo and the role of Bernice on the SABC1 drama series Molo Fish II. Other television series she acted in include Jozi Streets, Saints, Sinners and Settlers, Meeulanders, Arendsvlei, Die Sentrum, Projek Dina and Generations.

She directed two television pilots, as well as a docu-drama called Christmas in the City for SABC1, which aired on Christmas Day, 2007. She was also creative director on the kid's show Thabang Thabong, on SABC2.

In theatre, Herman played the role of Mimi Marquez - an HIV-positive exotic dancer and methamphetamine junkie - in the musical Rent, which ran at the Artscape Theatre in Cape Town from November - December, 2007.

In 2017 she won the SAFTA  Award in the category Best Achievement by a Lead Actress - TV Comedy for her role as Sylvia in Those Who Can't.

Chantal died on 18 May, 2023, at the age of 44, due to breast cancer.
data.name: Chantal Herman

data.biography:
Lois Maxwell, de son vrai nom Lois Hooker née le 14 février 1927 à Kitchener au Canada et morte le 29 septembre 2007 à Fremantle en Australie, est une actrice canadienne.

Née au Canada, elle débute à la radio avant de s'installer à l'âge de 15 ans au Royaume-Uni en 1942 avec les comédiens de l'armée canadienne, où elle commence une carrière d'actrice. Elle est aidée par Lady Mountbatten qui l'a fait entrer à la Royal Academy of Dramatic Art où elle se lie d'amitié avec Roger Moore.

Elle déménage à Hollywood dans les années 1940. Elle obtient son premier rôle en 1946 au côté de David Niven dans Une question de vie ou de mort. Elle obtient un Golden Globe de la révélation féminine (New Star Of The Year - Actress) en 1948 pour son rôle dans That Hagen Girl.

Revenue au Royaume-Uni, elle apparaît notamment dans Lolita et dans plusieurs épisodes de séries télévisées. Elle joue notamment dans deux épisodes de la série Le Saint (série télévisée)ainsi que dans l'épisode Une rancune tenace de la série Amicalement vôtre (The Persuaders!) , les trois avec Roger Moore3 qu'elle retrouvera dès 1973 en James Bond.

Son rôle le plus connu est celui de Miss Moneypenny — membre dévoué du MI6 et sensible au charme de James Bond — interprété de 1962 à 1985 dans les quatorze premiers films de la franchise James Bond, produits par EON Productions. Elle est ainsi après Desmond Llewelyn l'acteur qui est apparu le plus souvent dans la série des films. Elle avait postulé auprès du cinéaste Terence Young alors qu’elle élevait difficilement ses enfants en s’occupant de son mari malade.

Son dernier rôle est dans Vengeance secrète, en 2001. Partie vivre en Australie auprès de son fils, elle meurt d'un cancer le 29 septembre 2007, à l'hôpital de Fremantle.

Lois Maxwell, de nom real Lois Ruth Hooker (Kitchener, Canadà, 14 de febrer de 1927 - Fremantle a Austràlia, 29 de setembre de 2007) va ser una actriu canadenca. El seu paper més conegut és el de Miss Moneypenny — membre consagrat del MI6 i sensible a l'encant de James Bond — interpretat de 1962 a 1985 als catorze primers films de la franquícia James Bond, produïts per EON Produccions. És després de Desmond Llewelyn l'actor o actriu que ha aparegut més sovint a la sèrie dels films.

许龄月，1992年1月24日出生于云南省曲靖市，中国内地影视女演员。

2012年，许龄月因获得第61届环球小姐大赛中国区亚军而出道 。2013年，参演个人大银幕处女作《小时代》。2014年，许龄月主演个人首部电视剧作品《你是我的眼》 。2015年，主演根据饶雪漫同名小说改编的青春剧《左耳》；同年，出演现代都市悬疑片《我是证人》。 2016年，出演玄幻剧《择天记》。2019年，许龄月先后凭借都市剧《归去来》 、悬疑剧《无主之城》获得了电视剧品质盛典年度新人、第3届网影盛典年度剧集最佳女演员奖 。2020年，出演的古装剧《清平乐》播出；同年，出演的现代青春励志剧《燃！沙排少女》于青岛开机 。
data.name: 许龄月

許齡月，1992 年 1 月 24 日出生於雲南省曲靖市，中國內地影視女演員。

Sean Love Combs (born Sean John Combs; November 4, 1969), also known by his stage names Puff Daddy, P. Diddy, or Diddy, is an American rapper, actor, record producer, and record executive. Born in New York City, he worked as a talent director at Uptown Records before founding his own record label, Bad Boy Records in 1993. Combs has produced and cultivated artists such as the Notorious B.I.G., Mary J. Blige, and Usher.

Combs' debut album, No Way Out (1997), has been certified seven times platinum. The album was followed by Forever (1999), The Saga Continues... (2001), and Press Play (2006), all of which were commercially successful. In 2009, Combs created and produced the musical group Diddy – Dirty Money; they released their successful debut album Last Train to Paris in 2010.

Combs has won three Grammy Awards and two MTV Video Music Awards and is the producer of MTV's Making the Band. In 2022, Forbes estimated his net worth at US$1 billion. In 1998, he launched his own clothing line Sean John. He was nominated for the Council of Fashion Designers of America (CFDA) Award for Menswear Designer of the Year in 2000 and won in 2004.

In late 2023, Combs settled a high-profile sexual assault and abuse lawsuit filed by his former partner Cassie Ventura. Numerous lawsuits regarding sexual misconduct were filed in the following months, with several claimants alleging sexual assault and abuse by Combs between 1991 and 2009. A year later, several of Combs's properties were raided by the Department of Homeland Security, and that September he was charged with federal sex trafficking, transportation to engage in prostitution, and racketeering. In May 2025, Combs was criminally tried for sex trafficking, racketeering and transportation to engage in prostitution. He was found not guilty in all but two transportation charges, for which he was sentenced to 4 years and 2 months in prison and a $500,000 fine.

data.biography:
Sean Love Combs (nacido como Sean John Combs; 4 de noviembre de 1969), también conocido por sus nombres artísticos Puff Daddy, P. Diddy o Diddy, es un rapero, actor, productor discográfico y ejecutivo estadounidense. Nacido en la ciudad de Nueva York, trabajó como director de talentos en Uptown Records antes de fundar su propio sello discográfico, Bad Boy Records, en 1993. Combs ha producido y formado a artistas como The Notorious B.I.G., Mary J. Blige y Usher.

El álbum debut de Combs, No Way Out (1997), ha sido certificado siete veces platino. Al álbum le siguieron Forever (1999), The Saga Continues... (2001) y Press Play (2006), todos ellos con éxito comercial. En 2009, Combs creó y produjo el grupo musical Diddy – Dirty Money; lanzaron su exitoso álbum debut Last Train to Paris en 2010.

Combs ha ganado tres premios Grammy y dos MTV Video Music Awards, y es el productor de Making the Band de MTV. En 2022, Forbes estimó su patrimonio neto en 1.000 millones de dólares. En 1998, lanzó su propia línea de ropa, Sean John. Fue nominado al premio del Consejo de Diseñadores de Moda de América (CFDA) como Diseñador de Ropa Masculina del Año en el 2000 y resultó ganador en 2004.

A finales de 2023, Combs llegó a un acuerdo en una demanda de alto perfil por agresión sexual y abuso presentada por su ex pareja Cassie Ventura. En los meses siguientes se presentaron numerosas demandas relacionadas con conductas sexuales inapropiadas, con varios demandantes alegando agresión sexual y abuso por parte de Combs entre 1991 y 2009. Un año después, varias propiedades de Combs fueron registradas por el Departamento de Seguridad Nacional, y ese septiembre fue acusado de tráfico sexual federal, transporte para ejercer la prostitución y extorsión. En mayo de 2025, Combs fue juzgado penalmente por estos cargos. Fue declarado inocente de todos excepto de dos cargos de transporte, por los cuales fue sentenciado a 4 años y 2 meses de prisión y una multa de 500.000 dólares.

Lorraine Toussaint (* 4. April 1960 auf Trinidad) ist eine US-amerikanische Schauspielerin.  Toussaints Familie wanderte in die Vereinigten Staaten ein, als sie zehn Jahre alt war. Die Schauspielerin debütierte im Fernsehdrama The Face of Rage aus dem Jahr 1983. Im Fernsehdrama Im Netz der Gewalt (1986) spielte sie neben Richard Crenna eine der größeren Rollen. In der Abenteuerkomödie Die Traumtänzer (1989) übernahm sie eine größere Rolle neben Burt Reynolds und Casey Siemaszko.

Im Thriller Codename: Nina (1993) war Toussaint an der Seite von Bridget Fonda und Gabriel Byrne zu sehen. In den Jahren 1998 bis 2002 spielte sie in der Fernsehserie Any Day Now eine der beiden Hauptrollen. Für diese Rolle wurde sie in den Jahren 1999, 2000, 2001, 2002 und 2003 für den Image Award nominiert. Im mit zahlreichen Preisen und Nominierungen bedachten Fernsehdrama Die Liebe stirbt nie (2005) spielte sie eine größere Rolle neben Halle Berry.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia.

Anthony Charles Lynton Blair (born 6 May 1953) is a former British Labour Party politician who served as the Prime Minister of the United Kingdom from 2 May 1997 to 27 June 2007. He was the Member of Parliament (MP) for Sedgefield from 1983 to 2007 and Leader of the Labour Party from 1994 to 2007. He resigned from all of these positions in June 2007.

Tony Blair was elected Leader of the Labour Party in the leadership election of July 1994, following the sudden death of his predecessor, John Smith. Under his leadership, the party adopted the term "New Labour" and moved away from its traditional left wing position towards the centre ground. Blair subsequently led Labour to a landslide victory in the 1997 general election. At 43 years old, he became the youngest Prime Minister since Lord Liverpool in 1812. In the first years of the New Labour government, Blair's government implemented a number of 1997 manifesto pledges, introducing the minimum wage, Human Rights Act and Freedom of Information Act, and carrying out devolution, establishing the Scottish Parliament, the National Assembly for Wales, and the Northern Ireland Assembly.

Blair's role as Prime Minister was particularly visible in foreign and security policy, including in Northern Ireland, where he was involved in the 1998 Good Friday Agreement. From the start of the War on Terror in 2001, Blair strongly supported the foreign policy of US President George W. Bush, notably by participating in the 2001 invasion of Afghanistan and 2003 invasion of Iraq. Blair is the Labour Party's longest-serving Prime Minister, the only person to have led the Labour Party to three consecutive general election victories, and the only Labour Prime Minister to serve consecutive terms more than one of which was at least four years long.

He was succeeded as Leader of the Labour Party on 24 June 2007 and as Prime Minister on 27 June 2007 by Gordon Brown. On the day he resigned as Prime Minister, he was appointed the official Envoy of the Quartet on the Middle East. In May 2008, Blair launched his Tony Blair Faith Foundation. This was followed in July 2009 by the launching of the Faith and Globalisation Initiative with Yale University in the USA, Durham University in the UK and the National University of Singapore in Asia to deliver a postgraduate programme in partnership with the Foundation.

data.biography:
Steve Coulter, 1960 yılında Darlington, South Carolina, ABD'de dünyaya gelmiştir. Oyunculuk tutkusuyla genç yaşta sanatla iç içe olan Coulter, eğitimini prestijli North Carolina School of the Arts'ta tamamlayarak sahne sanatlarına profesyonel bir giriş yapmıştır. Kariyerinin ilk yıllarında sadece oyunculukla sınırlı kalmayıp yazar ve yönetmen olarak da endüstriye katkıda bulunmuş, özellikle Tyler Perry'nin "House of Payne" ve "Meet the Browns" gibi dizilerinde yazar olarak görev almıştır.

Onu kamera önünde dikkat çeken bir isim haline getiren süreç, 2010'lu yılların başında yer aldığı büyük yapımlarla başladı. "Açlık Oyunları" (The Hunger Games) (2012) filmindeki "Oyun Kurucu" rolü ve Denzel Washington'ın başrolünde olduğu "Uçuş" (Flight) (2012) gibi filmlerle Hollywood'da sağlam bir karakter oyuncusu olarak yer edindi.

Ancak Steve Coulter'ı dünya çapında korku sineması hayranlarının hafızasına kazıyan asıl başarı, modern korku türünün ustası James Wan ile kurduğu işbirliği oldu. İki büyük korku serisinde iki farklı kilit rolü üstlenerek nadir görülen bir başarıya imza attı. "Ruhlar Bölgesi" (Insidious) serisinde ("Chapter 2", "Chapter 3", "The Red Door") medyum ve iblis uzmanı "Carl" karakterini canlandırırken, aynı dönemde "Korku Seansı" (The Conjuring) evreninde ("The Conjuring", "Annabelle Comes Home", "The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It") Vatikan adına çalışan "Rahip Gordon" karakterine hayat verdi. Bu iki ikonik rol, onu türün en tanınan yüzlerinden biri yaptı.

Televizyon dünyasında ise AMC'nin fenomen dizisi "The Walking Dead"in 5. sezonunda canlandırdığı Alexandria'nın mimarı "Reg Monroe" karakteriyle geniş kitlelerce tanındı. Ayrıca "House of Cards", "Yellowstone" ve Starz yapımı "P-Valley" dizisinde canlandırdığı Belediye Başkanı Tydell Ruffin rolüyle dramatik yeteneğini sergiledi.

Son yıllarda kariyerini zirveye taşıyan projelerde yer almaya devam eden Coulter, Marvel Sinematik Evreni'ne (MCU) "She-Hulk: Attorney at Law" (2022) dizisindeki hukuk firması ortağı Holden Holliway rolüyle giriş yaptı. 2023 yılında ise Christopher Nolan'ın büyük ses getiren biyografik filmi "Oppenheimer"da kimyager James Conant'ı canlandırarak kariyerine prestijli bir halka daha ekledi. Usta bir karakter oyuncusu olarak hem sinema hem de televizyonda aktif kariyerini sürdürmektedir.

Jimmy Smits is an American actor. Smits is perhaps best known for his roles as attorney Victor Sifuentes on the 1980s legal drama L.A. Law, as NYPD Detective Bobby Simone on the 1990s police drama NYPD Blue, and as U.S. Congressman Matt Santos on The West Wing. He is also notable for his portrayal of Bail Organa in the Star Wars franchise, and Miguel Prado in Dexter.

Beginning in 1986, Smits played Victor Sifuentes in the first five seasons of the NBC television Steven Bochco legal drama L.A. Law, for which he was nominated for six Primetime Emmy Award for Outstanding Supporting Actor in a Drama Series, winning in 1990. In 1999, Smits received the HOLA Award for Excellence from the Hispanic Organization of Latin Actors (HOLA).

He appeared in films including Switch (1991), My Family (1995), The Jane Austen Book Club (2007).

Smits appeared as Senator Bail Organa of Alderaan in Star Wars: Episode II – Attack of the Clones (2002) and Star Wars: Episode III – Revenge of the Sith (2005), in which the character becomes Princess Leia's adoptive father. He reappeared as Bail Organa in the game Star Wars: The Force Unleashed (2008) and the spinoff movie Rogue One (2016). He later reprised the role for Obi-Wan Kenobi (2022).

Smits played the role of Congressman Matt Santos of Houston, Texas, in the final two seasons of the NBC television drama The West Wing.

In Dexter season 3, he played the role of Miguel Prado, an assistant district attorney who befriends the title character. He was nominated for an Emmy Award for Outstanding Guest Actor in a Drama Series for the role.

He portrayed the character Alex Vega in the CBS TV series Cane, which aired from September 25, 2007, to December 18, 2007, and was subsequently canceled by the network due to the 2007 Screen Writer's Guild strike.

In the fall of 2010, he starred in NBC's short-lived series Outlaw, about a U.S. Supreme Court justice who leaves the bench to return to practicing law. From 2012 to 2014, he joined the main cast of Sons of Anarchy as Nero Padilla. He also portrayed Elijah Strait in the short-lived NBC drama series Bluff City Law.

He starred in The Get Down, a musical drama television series which debuted in 2016 on Netflix. In 2021, He played Kevin Rosario in the musical film In the Heights.

He stars as Chief John Suarez on the CBS police drama East New York.

Jimmy Smits (9 de julio de 1955) es un actor estadounidense. Nació en una familia católica de inmigrantes de Surinam y de Puerto Rico. Su padre era un tipógrafo de Surinam y su madre una enfermera puertorriqueña.

Es ganador de un Globo de oro. Es principalmente conocido por su rol como el congresista demócrata Matt Santos en el drama político The West Wing. Además, ha trabajado en series de televisión como L. A. Law, interpretando a Víctor Sifuentes, NYPD Blue como el detective Boby Simón, Cane, Dexter y Sons of Anarchy como Nero Padilla. Entre sus papeles recientes más conocidos se encuentra el de interpretar al Senador Bail Organa en Star Wars (Episodios II, III y Rogue One) y a Nero Padilla en Sons of Anarchy. También destacó como Cyrus Garza en Outlaw. Apareció en el capítulo 7 de la 4ª temporada de la serie Brooklyn Nine-Nine interpretando al padre de una de las protagonistas. Además, interpretó al senador John Donovan en 24: Legacy.

También, en la cuarta temporada de la serie How to Get Away with Murder ("Como defender a un asesino ") interpretando al psiquiatra Isaac Roa.

Además aparece en la Serie "Bluff city law" como Elijah Strait. Y sale en la película "En un barrio de Nueva York" como Kevin Rosario.

Jimmy Smits é um ator norte-americano. Seu pai era um tipógrafo do Suriname e seu mãe uma enfermeira porto-riquenha. Ele foi criado em um ambiente familiar católico. Ele é o vencedor de um Prêmio Globo de Ouro. Ele é mais conhecido por seu papel como congressista Matt Santos no drama político The West Wing.

Jimmy Smits (Brooklyn, 1955. július 9. –) amerikai színész.

Leginkább televíziós sorozatokból ismert. Az 1980-as években Victor Sifuentes ügyvédet alakította az L.A. Law című drámasorozatban. Az 1990-es évek New York rendőrei elnevezésű rendőrdrámájában Bobby Simone nyomozót, míg a politikai témájú, Az elnök emberei című sorozatban Matt Santost formálta meg. A Dexter című sorozatból Miguel Prado szerepéből ismert, a Kemény motorosokban 2012 és 2014 között Nero Padillát játszotta.

A sorozatok mellett filmekben is rendszeresen szerepel: a Csillagok háborúja előzményfilmjeiben (Csillagok háborúja II: A klónok támadása – 2002; Csillagok háborúja III: A Sith-ek bosszúja – 2005), valamint a 2016-os Zsivány Egyes – Egy Star Wars-történet című folytatásban Bail Organát, Leia Organa örökbefogadó apját alakítja.

Smits színészi játékával több jelölés mellett egy Golden Globe-díjat, egy Primetime Emmy-díjat, egy Screen Actors Guild-díjat és egy Szaturnusz-díjat nyert el.

吉米·斯密茨（Jimmy Smits）是美国演员。Smits 最出名的角色可能是他在 1980 年代法律剧《洛杉矶法律》中饰演律师维克多·西富恩特斯，在 1990 年代警匪剧《纽约警察局蓝》中饰演纽约警察局侦探鲍比·西蒙，以及在《西翼》中饰演美国国会议员马特·桑托斯。他还因在《星球大战》系列中饰演 Bail Organa 和在 Dexter 中饰演 Miguel Prado 而著称。

从 1986 年开始，Smits 在 NBC 电视史蒂文·博科 （Steven Bochco） 法律剧《洛杉矶法律》的前五季中饰演维克多·西富恩特斯 （Victor Sifuentes），并因此获得了六次黄金时段艾美奖剧情类剧集杰出男配角奖提名，并于 1990 年获奖。1999 年，Smits 获得了西班牙裔拉丁演员组织 （HOLA） 颁发的 HOLA 卓越奖。

他出演的电影包括《开关》（1991 年）、《我的家人》（1995 年）、《简·奥斯汀读书俱乐部》（2007 年）。

Smits 在《星球大战：第二集 - 克隆人的进攻》（2002 年）和《星球大战：第三集 - 西斯的复仇》（2005 年）中饰演奥尔德兰的参议员 Bail Organa，其中角色成为莱娅公主的养父。他在游戏《星球大战：原力释放》（2008 年）和衍生电影《侠盗一号》（2016 年）中以 Bail Organa 的身份再次出现。他后来在欧比旺·克诺比 （2022） 中重新扮演了这个角色。

Smits在NBC电视剧《西翼》的最后两季中扮演德克萨斯州休斯顿的国会议员马特·桑托斯（Matt Santos）的角色。

在德克斯特第 3 季中，他扮演了米格尔·普拉多 （Miguel Prado） 的角色，他是一名助理地方检察官，与主角成为朋友。他凭借该角色获得艾美奖剧情类剧集杰出客串演员提名。

他在 2007 年 9 月 25 日至 2007 年 12 月 18 日播出的 CBS 电视连续剧《甘蔗》中饰演亚历克斯·维加 （Alex Vega） 角色，随后由于 2007 年编剧工会罢工而被网络取消。

2010年秋天，他出演了NBC的短命剧集《亡命之徒》，该剧讲述了一位美国最高法院大法官离开法官席重返法律界的故事。从 2012 年到 2014 年，他加入了《无政府状态之子》的主要演员阵容，饰演尼禄·帕迪拉。他还在短命的 NBC 电视剧《布拉夫城市法》中饰演 Elijah Strait。

他出演了音乐剧电视剧《The Get Down》，该剧于 2016 年在 Netflix 首播。2021年，他在音乐电影《在高地》中饰演凯文·罗萨里奥。

他在哥伦比亚广播公司（CBS）警匪剧《东纽约》中饰演约翰·苏亚雷斯（John Suarez）局长。
data.name: 吉米·斯密茨

data.biography:
Jimmy Smits est un acteur américain. Il est surtout connu pour ses rôles de l'avocat Victor Sifuentes dans la série policière des années 1980 La Loi sur les lois de Los Angeles, du détective Bobby Simone dans la série policière des années 1990 NYPD Blue et du membre du Congrès américain Matt Santos dans The West Wing. Il est également connu pour son interprétation de Bail Organa dans la franchise Star Wars et de Miguel Prado dans Dexter.

À partir de 1986, Smits a joué Victor Sifuentes dans les cinq premières saisons de la série télévisée juridique LA Law de Steven Bochco diffusée sur NBC, pour laquelle il a été nominé pour six Primetime Emmy Awards du meilleur second rôle dans une série dramatique, qu'il a remporté en 1990. En 1999, Smits a reçu le prix HOLA d'excellence de l'Organisation hispanique des acteurs latins (HOLA).

Il est apparu dans des films tels que Switch (1991), My Family (1995), The Jane Austen Book Club (2007).

Smits est apparu dans le rôle du sénateur Bail Organa d'Alderaan dans Star Wars : Episode II - L'Attaque des clones (2002) et Star Wars : Episode III - La Revanche des Sith (2005), dans lesquels le personnage devient le père adoptif de la princesse Leia. Il est réapparu dans le rôle de Bail Organa dans le jeu Star Wars : Le Pouvoir de la Force (2008) et le film dérivé Rogue One (2016). Il a ensuite repris le rôle pour Obi-Wan Kenobi (2022).

Smits a joué le rôle du membre du Congrès Matt Santos de Houston, au Texas, dans les deux dernières saisons de la série télévisée The West Wing de NBC.

Dans la saison 3 de Dexter, il a joué le rôle de Miguel Prado, un procureur adjoint qui se lie d'amitié avec le personnage principal. Il a été nominé pour un Emmy Award du meilleur acteur invité dans une série dramatique pour ce rôle.

Il a interprété le personnage d'Alex Vega dans la série télévisée CBS Cane, diffusée du 25 septembre 2007 au 18 décembre 2007, et qui a ensuite été annulée par le réseau en raison de la grève de la Screen Writer's Guild de 2007.

À l'automne 2010, il a joué dans la série éphémère Outlaw de NBC, qui raconte l'histoire d'un juge de la Cour suprême des États-Unis qui quitte son poste pour reprendre la pratique du droit. De 2012 à 2014, il a rejoint le casting principal de Sons of Anarchy dans le rôle de Nero Padilla. Il a également interprété Elijah Strait dans la série dramatique éphémère de NBC Bluff City Law.

Il a joué dans The Get Down, une série télévisée dramatique musicale qui a fait ses débuts en 2016 sur Netflix. En 2021, il a joué Kevin Rosario dans le film musical In the Heights.

Il incarne le chef John Suarez dans la série policière East New York de CBS.

吉米·斯密茨（Jimmy Smits）是美國演員。Smits 最出名的角色可能是他在 1980 年代法律劇《洛杉磯法律》中飾演律師維克多·西富恩特斯，在 1990 年代警匪劇《紐約警察局藍》中飾演紐約警察局偵探鮑比·西蒙，以及在《西翼》中飾演美國國會議員馬特·桑託斯。他還因在《星球大戰》系列中飾演 Bail Organa 和在 Dexter 中飾演 Miguel Prado 而著稱。

從 1986 年開始，Smits 在 NBC 電視史蒂文·博科 （Steven Bochco） 法律劇《洛杉磯法律》的前五季中飾演維克多·西富恩特斯 （Victor Sifuentes），並因此獲得了六次黃金時段艾美獎劇情類劇集傑出男配角獎提名，並於 1990 年獲獎。1999 年，Smits 獲得了西班牙裔拉丁演員組織 （HOLA） 頒發的 HOLA 卓越獎。

他出演的電影包括《倒轉人生》（1991 年）、《我的家人》（1995 年）、《簡·奧斯汀讀書俱樂部》（2007 年）。

Smits 在《星球大戰：第二集 - 克隆人的進攻》（2002 年）和《星球大戰：第三集 - 西斯的復仇》（2005 年）中飾演奧爾德蘭的參議員 Bail Organa，其中角色成為萊婭公主的養父。他在遊戲《星球大戰：原力釋放》（2008 年）和衍生電影《俠盜一號》（2016 年）中以 Bail Organa 的身份再次出現。他後來在歐比旺·克諾比 （2022） 中重新扮演了這個角色。

Smits 在 NBC 電視劇《西翼》的最後兩季中扮演德克薩斯州休斯頓的國會議員馬特·桑託斯（Matt Santos）的角色。

在德克斯特第 3 季中，他扮演了米格爾·普拉多 （Miguel Prado） 的角色，他是一名助理地方檢察官，與主角成為朋友。他憑藉該角色獲得艾美獎劇情類劇集傑出客串演員提名。

他在 2007 年 9 月 25 日至 2007 年 12 月 18 日播出的 CBS 電視聯續劇《加拿大原住民之殤》中飾演亞歷克斯·維加 （Alex Vega） 角色，隨後由於 2007 年編劇工會罷工而被網絡取消。

2010 年秋天，他出演了 NBC 的短命劇集《亡命之徒》，該劇講述了一位美國最高法院大法官離開法官席重返法律界的故事。從 2012 年到 2014 年，他加入了《無政府狀態之子》的主要演員陣容，飾演尼祿·帕迪拉。他還在短命的 NBC 電視劇《布拉夫城市法》中飾演 Elijah Strait。

他出演了音樂劇電視劇《The Get Down》，該劇於 2016 年在 Netflix 首播。2021 年，他在音樂電影《在高地》中飾演凱文·羅薩里奧。

他在哥倫比亞廣播公司（CBS）警匪劇《東紐約》中飾演約翰·蘇亞雷斯（John Suarez）局長。

Christopher Catesby Harington (born 26 December 1986), known professionally as Kit Harington, is an English actor. He is best known for his role as Jon Snow in the HBO fantasy television series Game of Thrones (2011–2019), for which he received a Golden Globe nomination and two nominations for Primetime Emmy Awards and Critics' Choice Television Awards.

A graduate of the Royal Central School of Speech & Drama, Harington made his professional acting debut in 2009 with the lead role of Albert Narracott in the West End play War Horse. He has since returned to the West End, taking roles in productions of The Children's Monologues (2015), The Vote (2015), Doctor Faustus (2016), and True West (2018–2019). He portrayed the titular role in the revival of William Shakespeare's Henry V (2022). He starred in the London transfer of the Jeremy O. Harris play Slave Play (2024).

He developed, produced, and starred as Robert Catesby in the 2017 BBC drama series Gunpowder. He has also acted in the Amazon Prime Video romantic comedy anthology series Modern Love (2021), the Apple TV+ anthology series Extrapolations (2023), and the HBO/BBC One drama series Industry (2024). He has acted in films such as the historical action drama Pompeii (2014), the period drama Testament of Youth (2014), and the drama The Death and Life of John F. Donovan (2018). He portrayed Dane Whitman in the Marvel Cinematic Universe film Eternals (2021). He voiced Eret, a dragon hunter in the second and third films of the How to Train Your Dragon film series (2014–2019).

Kit Harington nasceu em Londres, Inglaterra. Filho de Deborah Jane e David Richard Harington. É descendente do monarca Charles II pela sua avó paterna.

Estudou na Southfield Primary School entre 1992 e 1998. Em seguida passou a frequentar a Chantry High School em Martley entre 1998 e 2003. Frequentou também a Worcester Sixth Form College, onde estudou teatro entre 2003 e 2005.

Ele se formou pela Central School of Speech and Drama, escola constituinte da Universidade de Londres, em 2008

Companheira: Rose Leslie

Pais: David Richard Harington, Deborah Jane Catesby

Irmão: John Harington

Christopher Catesby Harington, dit Kit Harington est un acteur britannique, né le 26 décembre 1986 à Acton (Grand Londres).

Il s'est fait connaître avec le rôle de Jon Snow dans la série télévisée Game of Thrones.

Kit Harington 1986. december 26-án született Londonban. Apai és anyai ágon is nemesi származású. Édesapja, Sir David Richard Harington, 15. baronet és könyvkereskedő, 1944-ben született. Édesanyja, Deborah Jane Catesby Harington (született: 1947) korábban színdarabok írásával foglalkozott. Van egy idősebb fiútestvére, John "Jack" Catesby Harington, aki 1984-ben született. Családjában a 16. század óta öröklődik a baroneti cím apáról fiúra, ezen kívül több híres brit politikus, királyok és egy báró is akad felmenői között.

Már egészen fiatalon érdekelték a művészetek. Egy időben a fotózásban és a rajzolásban élte ki ezen irányú hajlamait. Eredetileg haditudósító vagy újságíró szeretett volna lenni, de végül - szülei legnagyobb meglepetésére - mégis a színészet mellett döntött.  Tíz éves korában a család elköltözött Worcesterbe. Az általános iskolát Southfieldben végezte el 1992 és 1998 között. Martley-ban, a Chantry Középiskolában érettségizett, majd a Worcester Sixth Form Főiskolán tanult dráma és színházi tudományok szakon. Végül a London Egyetem egyik kihelyezett szakán (Central School of Speech and Drama) folytatta tanulmányait, ahol 2008-ban diplomázott le.

💥Кристофер Кейтсби Харингтон. Родился в 1986-ом году в Лондоне, Великобритания. Рос в семье с младшим братом. Отец работал бизнесменом, а мать была драматургом. Учился в Лондонской академии музыки и театрального искусства. Работает актёром и продюсером. С 2018-го женат на актрисе Роуз Лесли, у пары 2-ое детей: сын и дочь, имена, не раскрываются

data.biography:
Christopher „Kit“ Catesby Harington (* 26. Dezember 1986 in London, England) ist ein britischer Schauspieler. Internationale Bekanntheit erlangte er durch die Rolle des Jon Schnee in der Fantasyserie Game of Thrones.  Von 2011 bis 2019 war Harington in der preisgekrönten Fantasyserie Game of Thrones als Jon Schnee/Aegon Targaryen (im Original Jon Snow) zu sehen. Die Dreharbeiten führten ihn vor allem nach Island, und er übte sich für die Rolle im Schwertkampf. Für seine Darstellung war er 2012 für einen Saturn Award als Bester Nebendarsteller im Fernsehen (Best Supporting Actor on Television) sowie gemeinsam mit dem Ensemble der Serie für einen Screen Actors Guild Award 2012 nominiert. Im August 2013 erhielt er den Young Hollywood Award als Actor of the Year.

2012 spielte Harington, wieder an der Seite von Sean Bean, in Silent Hill: Revelation 3D. 2014 verkörperte er in dem historischen Katastrophenfilm Pompeii den keltischen Gladiator Milo. An seiner Seite agierten unter anderem Carrie-Anne Moss und Kiefer Sutherland.  Quelle: Wikipedia
Christopher Catesby Harington (26 de diciembre de 1986), más conocido como Kit Harington es un actor británico, reconocido internacionalmente por su papel de Jon Snow en la saga Game Of Thrones.

ريستوفر كاتسبي هارينغتون معروف بـِ كيت هارينغتون (بالإنجليزية: Kit Harington)‏ هو ممثل إنجليزي ولد عام 1986 واشتهر بتأديته دور جون سنو في مسلسل صراع العروش. كما قام بدور البطولة في فيلم بومباي في 2014، وفي نفس العام أيضاً قام بتأدية صوت إرت في الجزء الثاني من فلم كيف تروض تنينك 2 ولد هارينغتون في حيّ أكتون في لندن ثم انتقل إلى وسترشير عند بلوغه الحادية عشر، ثم عاد ليستقر في لندن عند بلوغه الثامنة عشر. والده هو ديفيد ريتشارد هارينغتون ووالدته ديبورا جين وهي كاتِبة مسرحيّة سابقة. سمّته أمّه بذلك تيمناً بـِ كريستوفر مارلو. عمّه هو السير نيكولاس جون هارينغتون البارونت -وهي رتبة من رتب التاج البريطاني- الرابع عشر لأسرته. وجدّه السير ريتشارد هارينغتون وهو البارونت الثاني عشر. بالإضافة إلى أن كريستوفر هو سليل تشارلز الثاني ملك إنجلترا من خلال جدته أم أباه لافندر سيسيليا ديني. أيضاً من جهة والده، فإن هارينغتون ينحدر من كل من الأسكتلندي السياسي هنري دونداس الأول، والتاجر توماس أنتوني ديني، ورجل الدين المعمدان ويرثسلي نويل. وذكر في مقابلة له مع جيمي كاميل أنه سليل للكاتب جون هارينغتون أيضاً.

ارتاد كيت مدرسة ساوثفيلد الابتدائية بين عامي 1992 - 1998، ثم انتقل إلى مدرسة تشانتري الثانوية بين عامي 1998 - 2003. ثم درس الدراما والدراسات المسرحية في كلية ويستر السادسة بين عامي 2003 - 2005. وتخرج من المدرسة المركزية للخطابة والدراما في 2008. قبل التمثيل، أراد كريستوفر أن يكون صحفياً مُصوّراً أو مراسلاً حربياً. ولكن وخلال دراسته قام بتأدية دور ألبرت في مسرحية War Horse في المسرح الملكي الوطني في لندن. فازت المسرحية بجائزتين من جوائز المسرح وتلقى كريستوفر مديحاً بشأن الدور الذي أدّاه، وعلم حينها أن مستقبله سيكون التمثيل.

بعد ذلك، تلقّى كريستوفر لأداء أول دور له على التلفاز في مسلسل صراع العروش بدور جون سنو، وعرض المسلسل في 2011 وتلقى إعجاباً وإشادة كبيراً من النقاد. وصُورت مشاهد هارينغتون غالباً في أيسلندا وأيرلندا الشمالية ويتطلب منه الدور مهارة في استعمال السيف في القتال. رُشّح كيت إثرَ ذلك لنيل جائزة زحل لأفضل ممثل مُساعِد. وبدأ كريستوفر مسيرته السينمائية في فيلم سايلنت هيل: الوحي وهوَ فيلمُ رعبٍ مقتَبسٍ عن لعبة رعب البقاء سايلنت هيل 3 ويُعتبر استكمالاً لفيلم سايلنت هيل الذي أُنتِجَ في 2006. بعدَها كُرّم بكونِه مُمثل العام في حفل توزيع جوائز شباب هوليوود 2013 الذي يحتَفل بأبرز المواهب الشبابيّة الصاعدة في مجال السينما والتلفزيون والموسيقى. كما قام بدور البطولة في فيلم بومباي الذي يحكي عن مدينة بومبي المنكوبة في 2014، وفي نفس العام أيضاً قام بتأدية صوت إرت في الجزء الثاني من فلم كيف تُروّض تنينك.

شارَك كيت في فيلم الابن السابع مع المُمثل جيف بريدجز في 2015، وهوَ فيلم مغامرات وخيال تلقّى تقييماتٍ سلبيّة. ولعبَ دورَ البطولَة في الفيلم الدرامي عهد الشباب وشاركته البطولَة كُل من أليسيا فيكاندير وإميلي واتسون. وقد صَدر الفيلم في المملكة المتحدة بتاريخ 16 يناير 2015. وعُرضَ لأوّل مرة في مهرجان لندن السينمائي في أكتوبر 2014. كما لعِبَ دور البطولَة في فيلم الكوميديا التلفزيوني سبعة أيام في الجحيم الذي عُرِضَ على قناة HBO ويحكي عن مُبارة تينيس دامت 7 أيام.
data.name: كيت هارينغتون

傑·夏寧頓，1986 年 12 月 26 日出生於英國倫敦，演員。2008 年從戲劇學院畢業後，出演舞台劇《雷霆戰駒》並飾演男主角艾爾伯特。

2011 年，加入電視劇《冰與火之歌：權利的遊戲》，劇中飾 權力的演臨冬城公爵艾德·史塔克的私生子瓊恩·雪諾 ，並因此而為觀眾所熟悉。

2012 年，參演由邁克爾·巴塞特自編自導的電影《寂靜嶺 2》。之後，為夢工廠動畫片《馴龍高手 2》配音。同年，憑藉《冰與火之歌：權利的遊戲》中瓊恩·雪諾一角，獲得第 38 屆土星獎最佳電視男配角提名。
data.name: 傑·夏寧頓

data.biography:
Christopher Catesby Harington (ur. 26 grudnia 1986), znany zawodowo jako Kit Harington, jest angielskim aktorem. Najbardziej znany jest z roli Jona Snowa w serialu fantasy HBO Gra o tron ​​(2011–2019), za którą otrzymał nominację do Złotego Globu oraz dwie nominacje do Primetime Emmy Awards i Critics' Choice Television Awards.

Absolwent Royal Central School of Speech and Drama, Harington zadebiutował jako aktor w 2009 roku główną rolą Alberta Narracotta w sztuce War Horse wystawianej na West Endzie. Od tego czasu powrócił na West End, grając role w produkcjach The Children's Monologues (2015), The Vote (2015), Doctor Faustus (2016) i True West (2018–2019). Zagrał tytułową rolę w wznowieniu sztuki Williama Szekspira Henry V (2022). Obecnie występuje w londyńskiej wersji sztuki Jeremy'ego O. Harrisa Slave Play (2024).

Opracował, wyprodukował i zagrał rolę Roberta Catesby'ego w serialu dramatycznym BBC Spisek prochowy z 2017 roku. Wystąpił również w serialu komedii romantycznej Nowoczesna miłość (2021) na Amazon Prime Video, serialu antologicznym Ekstrapolacje (2023) na Apple TV+ i serialu dramatycznym Branża (2024) na HBO/BBC One. Wystąpił w takich filmach jak historyczny dramat akcji Pompeje (2014), dramat kostiumowy Testament młodości (2014) i Śmierć i życie Johna F. Donovana (2018). Wcielił się w postać Dane'a Whitmana w filmie Marvel Cinematic Universe Eternals (2021) oraz w udźwiękowionego Ereta, łowcę smoków, w drugim i trzecim filmie z serii Jak wytresować smoka (2014–2019).

Opis powyżej pochodzi z artykułu w Wikipedii autorstwa Kita Haringtona, udostępnionego na licencji CC-BY-SA. Pełna lista autorów w Wikipedii.

Christopher Catesby "Kit" Harington, 26 Aralık 1986 tarihinde Acton, Londra, İngiltere'de dünyaya gelmiştir. Eski bir oyun yazarı olan bir anne ve 15. Baronet unvanına sahip bir iş adamı babanın oğlu olan Harington, köklü bir İngiliz aristokrasisine dayanmakta olup, baba tarafından Kral II. Charles'ın soyundan gelmektedir. Worcester Sixth Form College'da drama ve tiyatro eğitimi aldıktan sonra, prestijli Central School of Speech and Drama'ya devam etti ve 2008 yılında buradan mezun oldu.

Profesyonel kariyerine, henüz tiyatro okulundayken Ulusal Tiyatro'nun ödüllü yapımı "War Horse"ta (Savaş Atı) başrol olan Albert Narracott karakterini canlandırarak hızlı ve etkileyici bir giriş yaptı. Bu performansıyla tiyatro dünyasında dikkatleri üzerine çekti, ancak onu uluslararası bir süperstar haline getiren proje, HBO'nun fantezi destanı "Game of Thrones" (2011-2019) oldu. İlk ekran deneyimi olmasına rağmen, dizinin ana karakterlerinden biri olan "Jon Snow"u canlandırdı. Kuzeyin gayrimeşru oğlu olarak başladığı ve liderliğe yükseldiği bu yolculuk, onu dizinin en sevilen yüzü yaptı ve kendisine bir Primetime Emmy adaylığı ile dünya çapında şöhret getirdi.

Dizi devam ederken sinema kariyerini de inşa etmeye başladı. "Sessiz Tepe: Karabasan" (2012) ile sinemaya adım attıktan sonra, tarihi aksiyon filmi "Pompeii"de (2014) başrol oynayarak fiziksel dönüşümünü ve aksiyon yıldızı potansiyelini sergiledi. "Gençlik Ahti" (Testament of Youth) (2014) filminde I. Dünya Savaşı dönemindeki dramatik performansıyla eleştirmenlerden tam not aldı. Ayrıca "Ejderhanı Nasıl Eğitirsin 2" (2014) ve devam filminde Eret karakterini seslendirdi. Kendi atası olan Robert Catesby'yi canlandırdığı ve aynı zamanda yapımcılığını üstlendiği BBC mini dizisi "Gunpowder" (2017) ile kariyerinde farklı bir yönünü ortaya koydu.

"Game of Thrones" sonrası dönemde Marvel Sinematik Evreni'ne "Eternals" (2021) filmiyle Dane Whitman (Black Knight) olarak katıldı. Tiyatro köklerine dönerek "True West" ve "Henry V" (2022) oyunlarında sahne aldı. Yakın zamanda HBO dizisi "Industry"nin üçüncü sezon kadrosuna katılan ve "Blood for Dust" (2023) filminde rol alan aktör, "Game of Thrones" setinde tanıştığı rol arkadaşı Rose Leslie ile evlidir.

data.name: Mùa Hè Của Hương Bạc Hà
data.overview: Cô gái múa ba lê Đồng Tịch phải giã từ thành phố lớn để trở về thị trấn nhỏ ở quê nhà do mẹ bị điều chuyển công tác. Cô muốn nhân cơ hội chuyển trường che giấu tính cách mạnh mẽ của mình nhưng nào ngờ lại bị thanh mai trúc mã Lâm Nam Nhất thân quen từ nhỏ nhìn thấu. Một người muốn đóng kịch, một người muốn vạch trần, từ liên tục hiểu lầm đến giúp đỡ lẫn nhau, cặp đôi oan gia này dần dần thấu hiểu và dựa dẫm vào nhau hơn trong cuộc sống thường ngày cùng bạn bè ở thị trấn.Tuy nhiên, Đồng Tịch vô tình biết được Lâm Nam Nhất chính là nam thần truyện tranh mà cô ngưỡng mộ bấy lâu... Khi những bối rối trên con đường theo đuổi ước mơ chạm phải những rung động đầu đời ngây ngô, trong trẻo, mối lương duyên tiền định này sẽ viết nên câu chuyện thanh xuân ngọt ngào vui vẻ trong mùa hè này.Và giữa họ còn rất nhiều những cuộc hội ngộ và chia ly...

data.biography: Logan Kim (born March 7, 2007) is an American actor. Kim made his feature film debut as "Podcast" in Ghostbusters: Afterlife (2021), directed by Jason Reitman. He reprised the role in the sequel, Ghostbusters: Frozen Empire (2024). On television, he currently stars as Hershel Rhee in The Walking Dead: Dead City (2023 - present).

谢琼煖（1971年10月7日－），是台湾电视剧、电影及舞台剧女演员。国立台北艺术大学戏剧系毕业。是横跨剧场、电视圈的演员。2014年以客家电视台《在河左岸》获得第49届金钟奖戏剧节目女配角奖和2014亚洲电视大奖最佳女配角奖。

data.biography: 謝瓊煖（1971 年 10 月 7 日－），是台灣電視劇、電影及舞台劇女演員。國立台北藝術大學戲劇系畢業。是橫跨劇場、電視圈的演員。2014 年以客家電視台《在河左岸》獲得第 49 屆金鐘獎戲劇節目女配角獎和 2014 亞洲電視大獎最佳女配角獎。

data.biography: Lorenzo Ferro, also known as Toto Ferro, was born on November 9, 1998 in Buenos Aires, Argentina. He is an Argentine actor who rose to fame for his debut film role in the Argentine film The Angel (2018), which is a biographical crime drama that is inspired by the true story of Argentine serial killer Carlos Robledo Puch. He is the son of Argentine actor Rafael Ferro.
data.name: Lorenzo Ferro

data.biography: Lorenzo Ferro nació en Buenos Aires en 1998. Es director, actor y músico. Como actor ha protagonizado El Ángel (Festival de Cannes, Festival Internacional de Cine de San Sebastián, TIFF. ) y Simon de la montaña (Semana de la Crítica - Grand Prix - 24', Festival Internacional de Cine de San Sebastián 24'). Fue distinguido como Mejor Actor en el Festival de Nouveau Cinema de Montreal, el Festival Internacional de Cine de Lima y en el Festival Internacional de Cine de Santiago por su papel en Simon de la montaña. También como Mejor Actor en el Festival Internacional de Cine de La Habana por su papel en El Ángel. Ha participado en series como Narcos, Fanático y El Marginal. Trabajó con grandes directores como Luis Ortega, Amat Escalante, Federico Luis, Andres Baiz, Lucia Seles. También se ha formado con Manuel Abrahmovich en el curso "Dip" (Documental, Imagen y Puesta en Escena). Estreno su opera prima "El Tren Fluvial" en la seccion Perspectives de la Berlinale 76, en co-direccion con Lucas Vignale. Con el que tambien escribió y dirigió su primer cortometraje, La Pasión, premiado en el BAFICI 25’ dentro de la Competencia Internacional.

魏千翔（Shawn Wei），1987年4月1日出生于上海市，中国内地影视男演员，毕业于上海戏剧学院播音与主持专业。

2010年，出演个人首部电视剧《唐琅探案》，从而正式进入演艺圈。2011年，出演古装宫廷剧《宫锁珠帘》。2012年，在谍战剧《X女特工》中饰演许正帆。2013年，其主演的古装传奇剧《兰陵王》在东方卫视、浙江卫视等4家卫视上星播出；同年，在古装武侠剧《鹿鼎记》中饰演康熙帝 [5]  。2014年，其主演的都市医疗剧《爱的妇产科》在湖南卫视首播。2015年，主演古装武侠剧《锦衣夜行》。2016年2月4日，其主演的职场喜剧《老板来了》在腾讯视频播出。2017年，主演革命战争剧《亮剑之雷霆战将》。2018年1月2日，其主演的年代生活剧《我的青春遇见你》首播。 2019年2月14日，主演的古装言情剧《东宫》播出。
data.name: 魏千翔

data.biography:
魏千翔（Shawn Wei），1987 年 4 月 1 日出生於上海市，中國內地影視男演員，畢業於上海戲劇學院播音與主持專業。

2010 年，出演個人首部電視劇《唐琅探案》，從而正式進入演藝圈。2011 年，出演古裝宮廷劇《宮鎖珠簾》。2012 年，在諜戰劇《X 女特工》中飾演許正帆。2013 年，其主演的古裝傳奇劇《蘭陵王》在東方衞視、浙江衞視等 4 家衞視上星播出；同年，在古裝武俠劇《鹿鼎記》中飾演康熙帝 。2014 年，其主演的都市醫療劇《愛的婦產科》在湖南衞視首播。2015 年，主演古裝武俠劇《錦衣夜行》。2016 年 2 月 4 日，其主演的職場喜劇《老闆來了》在騰訊視頻播出。2017 年，主演革命戰爭劇《亮劍之雷霆戰將》。2018 年 1 月 2 日，其主演的年代生活劇《我的青春遇見你》首播。

2019 年 2 月 14 日，主演的古裝言情劇《東宮》播出。

data.biography:
2005년에 Mnet Let's CokePLAY 배틀신화 프로그램에 출연하여 최종 우승자로 발탁되었다.

2007년 애프터스쿨의 유이와 원더걸스의 유빈, 솔로 가수 G.NA, 스피카의 양지원과 그룹 오소녀를 결성했으나 소속사 GOOD EMG의 재정 악화로 데뷔 직전 해체하였다.

2009년 10월에는 음악 그룹 시크릿으로 데뷔하였다.

데뷔 전에는 같은 시크릿 멤버였던 한선화와 같은 소속사 선배그룹인 언터쳐블의 My Boo 피쳐링에 참가하였다.

2014년 5월 12일 이단옆차기의 곡으로 시크릿 멤버들 중 송지은에 이어 두번째로 솔로로 출격하였다. 앨범 이름은 "TOP SECRET"이며 타이틀곡은 굿 나잇 키스(Good-night Kiss).

2015년 5월 7일 미니 앨범 "FANTASIA"로 두번째 솔로앨범을 발매하였다.

2016년 3월 28일 미니 앨범 "물들다 : Colored"로 3번째 솔로 활동을 하였다.

2019년 3년만에 자신이 작사/작곡을 비롯하여 앨범 프로듀싱에 참여한 디지털 싱글 "STARLIGHT"를 발매하여 솔로 활동을 재개하였다.
data.name: 전효성

data.biography:
高素熙是当今韩国电影界最令人过目难忘的个性女演员之一，被评价为“天生的演员”，她原先则是一名戏剧演员。读初中的高素熙就对参加剧会的姐姐带回来的剧本很感兴趣，自己也经常一个人去剧场看表演，有的甚至看了15遍以上还觉得津津有味，其中《我们的被扭曲的英雄》对她的冲击可谓最大；高中时节高素熙开始参加剧团演出，后进入安阳艺术高中学习三年的戏剧，大学里专攻的是放送演艺学科，期间继续不断挑战演技，然而这一切仅限于热爱，高素熙觉得自己想要成为银幕上的真正的演员的梦想也许只是一个梦想，经历了很多没有丝毫办法的日子高素熙的幸运之神终于降临。

　　当她第一次成为舞台中央的主角而和同是戏剧演员出身的朴海一一起在大学路上演出《青春礼赞》之际，演员金罗河把她介绍给了奉俊昊导演，后者观看了她的演出并且在之后把她带到了电影《绑架门口狗》的拍摄现场，一个令人印象深刻的“肥女”的角色打开了高素熙的银色之门，6年之后奉俊浩导演又用影片《怪物》为她实现了另外一个愿望：同宋康昊前辈一起演戏；她在这部改写票房历史的影片中客串了一位被宋康昊拿着注射器绑架的护士的角色。

　　高素熙出演的电影作品还包括《四者性语》《R.U. Ready?》《你是我的命运》《没教养的家伙》等，数量并不多，但是每次演出都令人过目难忘，角色变化也极大，譬如恐怖片《粉红色高跟鞋》中偷去粉色高跟鞋而惨遭横死的后辈、《亲切的金子》中吃掉死去的花心丈夫的人肉的女子等等。于此同时高素熙依然活跃在大学路上的剧院里，作品有《dirty pig》、《花茶房布雷斯》、《代代孙孙》等；她不但和演员裴斗娜一起合作多部电影，还共同出演了话剧版《首尔星期天》以及SBS电视剧《总是挂念》 等等，默契程度非常了得。

　　她最为中国观众熟知的作品就是《阳光姐妹淘》（豆瓣评分8.8，TOP250第No.99），在剧中饰演青春无比的SUNNY成员，那个憨厚可爱的整天沉迷于双眼皮的成年金玫瑰，这也是她在豆瓣评分最高的作品。
data.name: 高素熙

data.biography:
高素熙是當今韓國電影界最令人過目難忘的個性女演員之一，被評價為“天生的演員”，她原先則是一名戲劇演員。讀初中的高素熙就對參加劇會的姐姐帶回來的劇本很感興趣，自己也經常一個人去劇場看錶演，有的甚至看了 15 遍以上還覺得津津有味，其中《我們的被扭曲的英雄》對她的衝擊可謂最大；高中時節高素熙開始參加劇團演出，後進入安陽藝術高中學習三年的戲劇，大學裏專攻的是放送演藝學科，期間繼續不斷挑戰演技，然而這一切僅限於熱愛，高素熙覺得自己想要成為銀幕上的真正的演員的夢想也許只是一個夢想，經歷了很多沒有絲毫辦法的日子高素熙的幸運之神終於降臨。

當她第一次成為舞台中央的主角而和同是戲劇演員出身的樸海一一起在大學路上演出《青春禮讚》之際，演員金羅河把她介紹給了奉俊昊導演，後者觀看了她的演出並且在之後把她帶到了電影《綁架門口狗》的拍攝現場，一個令人印象深刻的“肥女”的角色打開了高素熙的銀色之門，6 年之後奉俊浩導演又用影片《科學怪人：創生之父》為她實現了另外一個願望：同宋康昊前輩一起演戲；她在這部改寫票房歷史的影片中客串了一位被宋康昊拿著注射器綁架的護士的角色。

高素熙出演的電影作品還包括《四者性語》《R.U. Ready? 》《你是我的命運》《沒教養的傢夥》等，數量並不多，但是每次演出都令人過目難忘，角色變化也極大，譬如恐怖片《粉紅色高跟鞋》中偷去粉色高跟鞋而慘遭橫死的後輩、《親切的金子》中吃掉死去的花心丈夫的人肉的女子等等。於此同時高素熙依然活躍在大學路上的劇院裏，作品有《dirty pig》、《花茶房佈雷斯》、《代代孫孫》等；她不但和演員裴鬥娜一起合作多部電影，還共同出演了話劇版《首爾星期天》以及 SBS 電視劇《總是掛念》 等等，默契程度非常了得。

她最為中國觀眾熟知的作品就是《陽光姊妹淘》（豆瓣評分 8.8，TOP250 第 No. 99），在劇中飾演青春無比的 SUNNY 成員，那個憨厚可愛的整天沉迷於雙眼皮的成年金玫瑰，這也是她在豆瓣評分最高的作品。
data.name: 高素熙

data.biography:
Kim Jae Wook é um modelo e ator sul-coreano da agência de atores 'Management SOOP'. Kim nasceu em Seul, na Coreia do Sul, mas sua família foi para o Japão mais tarde. Kim Jae Wook cresceu no Japão até os 7 anos de idade e depois retornou para a Coreia. Devido ao tempo que passou no Japão, ele fala japonês fluentemente.

Em 2002, Kim estreou como membro de uma banda indie no drama da MBC 'Ruler of Your Own World'. Após esse primeiro papel, ele se concentrou na carreira de modelo por 5 anos. Em 2007, ele fez o teste e ganhou o papel de No Sun-ki na série dramática de sucesso de 2007 'Coffee Prince'. O papel o levou à fama na Coreia do Sul e em vários países asiáticos. Mais tarde, ele apareceu no drama de 2008 'O Reino dos Ventos' e serviu como embaixador da boa vontade no 9º Festival Internacional de Cinema de Jeonju (JIFF) em maio de 2008.

Kim então estrelou seu primeiro filme, 'Antique', baseado no mangá 'Antique Bakery', que foi convidado para o 59º Festival Internacional de Cinema de Berlim. Ele interpretou um chef gay que trabalhava em uma padaria. Ele ganhou o prêmio de 'Melhor Novo Ator' no 16º Korean Entertainment Awards. Em outubro de 2009, ele formou uma banda de rock moderno chamada Walrus, onde atuou como guitarrista e vocalista. O nome do grupo veio do single dos Beatles 'I am the Walrus'.

Antes de se alistar no serviço militar em 2011, ele tocou no musical de rock Hedwig And the Angry Inch, de 14 de maio a 19 de junho de 2011. Kim fez seu retorno na série de televisão de 2013 'Who Are You?' depois de terminar o serviço militar obrigatório, interpretando o namorado morto do personagem de So Yi-Hyun. Em 2014, Kim apareceu no drama de ação de época da KBS 'Inspiring Generation' como rival de Kim Hyun-Joong, mas desistiu após o episódio 8 devido a circunstâncias inevitáveis.

Ele é mais conhecido por seus papéis em 'Mary Stayed Out All Night', 'Voice', 'Temperature of Love', 'The Guest' e 'Her Private Life' pela primeira vez como protagonista principal em uma comédia romântica.
data.name: Kim Jae Wook

data.overview: Sứ Mệnh Xuyên Không (Recontroller) là một bộ phim khoa học viễn tưởng của Trung Quốc, được đạo diễn Sun Xiao cho ra mắt vào năm 2017. Bộ phim lấy đề tài khoa học viễn tưởng liên quan đến câu chuyện xuyên không, kiểm soát thời gian đã quen thuộc nhưng chưa bao giờ nhàm chán.  Nhân vật chính trong phim là anh chàng Hiểu Minh, một người trẻ tuổi có khả năng đặc biệt, đó là anh có thể xuyên không gian và thời gian và di chuyển qua lại giữa chúng. Hiểu Minh đưa nhóm bạn giao hàng của mình đến với cánh cửa xuyên không đó, họ có một hành trình đầy kỳ ảo và thú vị.  Nhóm bạn gặp gỡ những người máy robot thông minh, những người máy được gọi tắt là AI, đây là một thế hệ tương lai của khoa học. Tuy vậy, trong khi thán phục với sự hiện đại và thông minh của Ai, Hiểu Minh nhận ra rằng những người máy này hiện đang thực hiện âm mưu thống trị thế giới và xóa bỏ loài người. Hiểu Minh với khả năng đặc biệt của mình, liệu có thể làm được gì để giúp thế giới con người của chúng ta?
data.title: Sứ Mệnh Xuyên Không

data.biography:
Araceli Jover was born in Melilla, a Spanish region. After living there for five years, her family was forced to move to Mallorca, in the Balearic Islands (Spain) because of her father's work as a soldier. She is the youngest of seven siblings, four sisters and three brothers.

During her early years, she wanted to become a dancer. She began dancing at the age of 8. At 14 she dropped out of school and at 15 she won a scholarship from the Comité Hispano Norteamericano. Because of this, she left Spain and moved to New York City in order to continue to study at the School of American Ballet under Martha Graham. After two years and half in the United States, her career then moved on to becoming an actress sometime around 1995–1996. She had her first role in an episode of the TV show Women: Stories of Passion and starred in two international films Tango, and The Ballad of Johnny-Jane. After that, she did more work in TV, before making her first American film debut in Blade, in 1998, as Mercury; the vampire lover of Deacon Frost.
data.name: Arly Jover

data.biography:
Arly Jover, née Araceli Jover à Melilla en Espagne le 2 février 1971, est une actrice et danseuse espagnole.

Née à Melilla, une presqu'île espagnole enclavée dans le territoire marocain, Arly Jover est la cadette d'une famille de sept enfants et son père travaille pour l'armée. À l'âge de 5 ans, elle emménage à Majorque dans les îles Baléares.

Trois ans plus tard, elle commence l'apprentissage de la danse. À quinze ans, elle quitte l'Espagne et intègre l'école de l’American Ballet Theatre de New York aux États-Unis. En 1996, à la suite de sérieuses blessures, elle doit arrêter la danse et décide de devenir actrice.

Elle débute à la télévision avec un petit rôle dans Women: Stories of Passion. Après quelques autres apparitions télévisées, elle se fait remarquer en 1998 dans Blade, le film de Stephen Norrington. Elle interprète Mercury, la vampire amoureuse de Deacon Frost (Stephen Dorff). Dans les années suivantes, elle apparaît dans de nombreux petits rôles au cinéma et dans des séries. On lui confie parfois des personnages plus importants dans des films tels que Fish in a Barrel ou Vampires 2: Adieu vampires.

Finalement, après 18 ans aux États-Unis, elle décide de partir pour la France. Peu de temps après son arrivée, elle obtient un rôle majeur dans L'Empire des loups, de Chris Nahon, aux côtés de Jocelyn Quivrin et Jean Reno. Un an plus tard, elle interprète la femme de Didier Bourdon dans la comédie Madame Irma. Elle reste dans ce registre pour son film suivant: Les Deux mondes, qui lui permet de donner la réplique à Benoît Poelvoorde.

En 2008, la jeune femme décide de prendre l'air avec Le Voyage aux Pyrénées, des frères Larrieu avec Jean-Pierre Darroussin et Sabine Azéma. Elle est ensuite à l'affiche des Regrets de Cédric Kahn, avec Yvan Attal et Valeria Bruni Tedeschi.

En 2018, Arly crée Médialath Studio, pour la création et le développement de ses projets.

Source: Article "Arly Jover" de Wikipédia en français, soumis à la licence CC-BY-SA 3.0.

Araceli Jover出生于西班牙梅利利亚地区。在那里生活了五年后，由于她父亲的士兵工作，她的家人被迫搬到巴利阿里群岛（西班牙）的马略卡岛。她是七个兄弟姐妹、四个姐妹和三个兄弟中最小的一个。

早年，她想成为一名舞者。她从8岁开始跳舞。14岁时，她辍学，15岁时，她获得了北美洲西班牙委员会的奖学金。正因为如此，她离开了西班牙，搬到了纽约市，以便在玛莎·格雷厄姆（Martha Graham）的指导下继续在美国芭蕾舞学校学习。在美国呆了两年半后，她的职业生涯在 1995 年至 1996 年左右的某个时候成为一名女演员。她在电视节目《女人：激情的故事》的一集中扮演了她的第一个角色，并出演了两部国际电影《探戈》和《约翰尼-简的歌谣》。在那之后，她在电视上做了更多的工作，然后在 1998 年的《刀锋战士》中首次亮相美国电影，饰演水星;弗罗斯特执事的吸血鬼情人。
data.name: 阿莉·乔夫

data.biography:
Araceli Jover 出生於西班牙梅利利亞地區。在那裏生活了五年後，由於她父親計程車兵工作，她的家人被迫搬到巴利阿裏羣島（西班牙）的馬略卡島。她是七個兄弟姐妹、四個姐妹和三個兄弟中最小的一個。

早年，她想成為一名舞者。她從 8 歲開始跳舞。14 歲時，她輟學，15 歲時，她獲得了北美洲西班牙委員會的獎學金。正因為如此，她離開了西班牙，搬到了紐約市，以便在瑪莎·格雷厄姆（Martha Graham）的指導下繼續在美國芭蕾舞學校學習。在美國呆了兩年半後，她的職業生涯在 1995 年至 1996 年左右的某個時候成為一名女演員。她在電視節目《女人：激情的故事》的一集中扮演了她的第一個角色，並出演了兩部國際電影《探戈》和《約翰尼 - 簡的歌謠》。在那之後，她在電視上做了更多的工作，然後在 1998 年的《幽靈刺客》中首次亮相美國電影，飾演水星; 弗羅斯特執事的吸血鬼情人。
data.name: 阿莉·喬夫

data.biography:
Bae Jong Ok je herečka působící v současné době pod hlavičkou J,Wide-Company.

Narodila se v jihokorejském Soulu a po angažmá v KBS debutovala jako televizní herečka, od té doby působí jak ve filmu, tak v televizi.

Současně s hereckou kariérou dokončila Bae doktorát na Korejské univerzitě. Její disertační práce se zabývala korelací mezi produkčními štáby a reakcemi netizénů. Od roku 2003 vyučuje divadelní a filmová studia na univerzitě Chung-Ang jako externí profesorka.

Bae se v roce 1994 provdala za pilota, ale v roce 1996 se manželé rozvedli. Má dceru, která studuje ve Spojených státech.

data.overview: Nàng Trợ Lý Của Anh kể về Hà Tiểu Ninh, một cô gái xinh đẹp, đáng yêu nhưng có niềm đam mê mãnh liệt với nghề diễn viên lồng tiếng. Dù không qua đào tạo nhưng cô luôn khao khát được làm việc trong một công ty có thể thực hiện được nguyện vọng của mình. Hà Tiểu Ninh là "fan cứng" của Mạc Đại (Mặc Ngôn) - diễn viên lồng tiếng chuyên nghiệp cho các bộ phim nổi tiếng. Động lực giúp cô đến với nghề lồng tiếng cũng được “truyền cảm hứng” từ nam thần tượng mà cô luôn yêu mến, quý mến. Tiểu Ninh hiếm hoi gặp gỡ Bất Ngu, nhưng nàng không biết rằng hắn chính là "đại nhân" trong lòng nàng bấy lâu nay. Mối quan hệ thú vị này lên đến đỉnh điểm khi Tiểu Ninh bất ngờ trở thành đồng nghiệp với tư cách là trợ lý của vị đại sư người Macedonian “không nổi tiếng”.

data.overview: Kết thúc của phần trước, nhân vật chính Beatrice Prior (Shailene Woodley), hay còn gọi là Tris, đã xông vào phòng thí nghiệm thuộc phân khu Erudite và giải cứu được Four (Theo James). Đồng thời cô cũng ngăn chặn được kế hoạch của Jeanine (Kate Winslet) sử dụng công nghệ huyết thanh để khống chế những chiến binh thuộc phân khu Dauntless thành tay sai cho kế hoạch kiểm soát tất cả các phân khu còn lại.  Nhưng mối đe dọa ngấm ngầm trong một hệ thống xã hội đã bắt đầu xuất hiện nhiều bất ổn vẫn luôn tồn tại, và để đủ sức mạnh đương đâu với nó, Tris phải tiếp tục chinh phục được nỗi sợ hãi của bản thân trong chính những giấc mơ của mình. Tris mang những phẩm chất của cả 2 phân khu là Dauntless (Dũng cảm) và Abnegation (Vị Tha - Vô Ngã) như Tris, điều đó đồng nghĩa với việc cô phải đối diện với sự mất mát của những người thân yêu nhất.

data.biography:
Mark Samual Bonanno is best known for his general silliness within comedy troupe Aunty Donna, one of Australia's biggest comedic acts who have garnered a huge international audience both live and online.

Since studying Acting at the University of Ballarat Arts Academy, Mark's work has won and been nominated for numerous awards, including the Helpmann Award for Best Comedy in 2017, Best of The Fest at Sydney Comedy Festival in 2018, and across the last few years, Best Supporting Actor, Best Ensemble and Best Comedy Web Series at the Melbourne International Web Festival.

Mark's work directing Demi Lardner's 2017 and 2018 stage shows also saw award attention, winning both the Melbourne International Comedy Festival Director's Choice Award and Pinder Prize in their respective years.

In 2020, Mark has co-written/created the six part sitcom Why Are You Like This, which will be coming to the ABC (Australia).

Mark also live streams weekly on Twitch under the name VeryPoliteGamer.
data.name: Mark Bonanno

data.biography: Thomas Gottschalk (born 18 May 1950) is a German television host. He is best-known for hosting "Wetten, dass..?".

Thomas Gottschalk, geboren am 18. Mai 1950 in Bamberg, ist ein bekannter deutscher Radio- und Fernsehmoderator, Entertainer und Schauspieler. Er begann seine Karriere beim Radio und wurde durch die Sendung "Pop nach acht" auf Bayern 3 bekannt. Später wechselte er zum Fernsehen und moderierte unter anderem die erfolgreiche Show "Na sowas!" auf ZDF.

Sein größter Erfolg war jedoch die Moderation der Unterhaltungsshow "Wetten, dass..?" von 1987 bis 2023, die zu einer der erfolgreichsten Fernsehshows in Europa wurde. Gottschalk hat auch in mehreren Filmen mitgespielt, darunter "Trabbi goes to Hollywood" und "Sister Act 2: Back in the Habit".
data.name: Thomas Gottschalk

data.biography:
Ο Ολιβιέ Κρετς (Olivier Kretz) είναι ένας κτηματομεσίτης που έγινε γνωστός χάρη στην εκπομπή του που μεταδόθηκε στο TMC και έπειτα στο Netflix και ονομάζεται Οικογένεια Κρετς: Μεσίτες Πολυτελών Ακινήτων. Το πρόγραμμα ακολουθεί τον ίδιο και την υπόλοιπη οικογένειά του στην καθημερινότητά τους ως μεσίτες πολυτελών ακινήτων.

Ο πρώην διευθυντής πωλήσεων είναι ο σύζυγος της Σαντρίν Κρετς (Sandrine Kretz), πρώην δασκάλας στο Lübeck στο 16ο διαμέρισμα του Παρισιού. Το 2007, το ζευγάρι αγόρασε την αρ ντεκό έπαυλη Renard, που βρίσκεται στη Boulogne όπου ζούσε ο André Malraux. Αυτό ήταν το έναυσμα: ανέπτυξαν ένα πάθος για τα ακίνητα και αποφάσισαν να δημιουργήσουν το δικό τους πρακτορείο που ειδικεύεται στα είδη πολυτελείας, που ονομάζεται Kretz & Partners. Εργάζονται με τους τέσσερις γιους τους Μαρτέν, Βαλεντάν, Λουί και Ραφαέλ.

Η πρώτη σεζόν του προγράμματός τους μεταδίδεται το 2020. Χάρη στο ταλέντο τους στις σχέσεις, οι Κρετς ανακαλύπτουν πολυτελή σπίτια στο Παρίσι και σταδιακά επεκτείνουν τις δραστηριότητές τους σε όλη τη Γαλλία και στη συνέχεια σε όλο τον κόσμο.
data.name: Ολιβιέ Κρετς

data.biography: 真野恵里菜 (Mano Erina) is a Japanese pop singer, actress, and model. She is a former soloist under Hello! Project, which she first joined in 2006 as a member of Hello Pro Egg. On March 29, 2008, she graduated from Ongaku Gatas and Hello Pro Egg to become a soloist. She has sold over 186,165 copies in Japan alone. Mano's highest selling single is "Otome no Inori" with 25,228 copies sold while her lowest selling major label single is "My Days for You" with 12,622 copies sold. On July 21, 2012, during the Hello!
